MeshFlow X Test Document
Project: Smart Hospital Management System
This document describes a hospital modernization project. The goal is to reduce patient waiting
time, improve medical record management, automate appointment scheduling, and generate
analytics dashboards for administrators.
Objectives
1. Digitize patient records.
2. Build appointment scheduling.
3. Integrate laboratory reports.
4. Provide Al-based diagnosis assistance.
5. Create monthly analytics reports.
Implementation Tasks
- Design database schema.
- Develop REST APIs.
- Implement authentication.
- Connect payment gateway.
- Build doctor dashboard.
- Build patient mobile app.
- Perform security testing.
- Deploy on cloud infrastructure.
Risks
Data privacy compliance, server downtime, API failures, and user adoption.
Expected Deliverables
Workflow documentation, implementation roadmap, cost estimate, timeline, technical architecture,
testing checklist, and deployment guide.
